low_gaps.title: Lock timeout was 5s making concurrent test slow
low_gaps.description: Original plan used _GATE_LOCK_TIMEOUT = 5 seconds, causing test_concurrent_gate_raises_error to wait 5s before timeout. Reduced to 1s — fail fast and let operator retry via 'gate status'.

low_gaps.title: gate_summary double-read of verdict files
low_gaps.description: Original implementation called list_verdicts() then re-scanned verdicts/ for duration_ms data — two passes over the same files. Refactored to a single pass reading both verdict counts and durations together.

low_gaps.title: Missing __all__ in gate_ops.py
low_gaps.description: New gate_ops.py module was missing __all__ export list, inconsistent with gate_audit.py and other core modules that declare __all__.

low_gaps.title: No test for lock release on exception
low_gaps.description: Task 3 tested lock acquisition and contention but not that the lock is released when gate evaluation raises an exception. Added test_lock_released_on_exception to verify the finally-block releases the lock.

spec_9_2_control_flow.notes: Resumable gates (M10 check_gate_reuse), atomic marker (M10), CONCERNS→debt (M10), FAIL→Remediator→park (M10 route_gate_verdict), apply_remediation bridge (M11 Task 6), review_max_cycles (M10), PARK+continue (M10 park_story), human takeover (M10 risk-9 park).

spec_11_1_operator_runbook.notes: 9-section runbook (M10), runbook reference enrichment in route results (M11 Task 8), runbook ref in GateCompletedAudit (M11 Task 1/2), runbook update with M11 CLI commands (M11 Task 15).

spec_18_nfrs.determinism: covered by M9 verdict engine (pure adjudication)
spec_18_nfrs.performance: duration tracking (M11 Task 2), avg_duration_ms in summary (M11 Task 7)
spec_18_nfrs.resilience: crash recovery (M10), concurrent gate protection via filelock (M11 Task 3), fail-closed (M10 empty-registry test)
spec_18_nfrs.observability: GateDecision+GateRendered (M9/M10), GateCompletedAudit with duration+runbook_ref (M11 Tasks 1-2), gate doctor health check (M11 Task 5)
spec_18_nfrs.auditability: HMAC hash-chain (M10), full audit chain e2e test (M11 Task 13)
spec_18_nfrs.security: trust boundary (M3), _SAFE_ID CLI validation (M10), rerun input validation (M11 Task 12)
spec_18_nfrs.compatibility: Path.as_posix() convention, cross-platform paths, os.replace for atomics
